_note: Classification of key BNS sections with IPC equivalents

BNS_103.title: Punishment for murder
BNS_103.punishment: Death or imprisonment for life, and fine

BNS_105.title: Culpable homicide not amounting to murder
BNS_105.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or up to 10 years, and fine

BNS_106.title: Death caused by negligence
BNS_106.punishment: Imprisonment up to 5 years, and fine

BNS_107.title: Abetment of suicide
BNS_107.punishment: Imprisonment up to 10 years, and fine

BNS_108.title: Attempt to commit suicide to compel restraint
BNS_108.punishment: Simple imprisonment up to 1 year, or fine, or both

BNS_109.title: Attempt to murder
BNS_109.punishment: Imprisonment up to 10 years, and fine; if hurt caused, imprisonment for life or up to 10 years and fine

BNS_110.title: Attempt to commit culpable homicide
BNS_110.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both

BNS_111.title: Organised crime
BNS_111.punishment: Death or imprisonment for life, and fine not less than 10 lakhs

BNS_113.title: Terrorist act
BNS_113.punishment: Death or imprisonment for life, and fine

BNS_115.title: Voluntarily causing hurt
BNS_115.punishment: Imprisonment up to 1 year, or fine up to 10,000 or both

BNS_117.title: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt
BNS_117.punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years, and fine

BNS_118.title: Voluntarily causing hurt by dangerous weapons
BNS_118.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both

BNS_121.title: Voluntarily causing hurt to deter public servant
BNS_121.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both

BNS_127.title: Wrongful confinement
BNS_127.punishment: Imprisonment up to 1 year, or fine up to 1000, or both

BNS_130.title: Kidnapping
BNS_130.punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years, and fine

BNS_137.title: Kidnapping for ransom
BNS_137.punishment: Death or imprisonment for life, and fine

BNS_140.title: Trafficking of person
BNS_140.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment 7 to 10 years, and fine

BNS_143.title: Trafficking of minor
BNS_143.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment 14 years to life, and fine

BNS_63.title: Rape
BNS_63.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment not less than 10 years, may extend to life, and fine

BNS_64.title: Punishment for rape
BNS_64.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment not less than 10 years, extendable to life, and fine

BNS_65.title: Rape on woman under 16 years
BNS_65.punishment: Imprisonment not less than 20 years, extendable to life (remainder of natural life), and fine

BNS_66.title: Rape on woman under 12 years
BNS_66.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment not less than 20 years, extendable to life or death

BNS_70.title: Gang rape
BNS_70.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment not less than 20 years, extendable to life, and fine

BNS_74.title: Assault on woman with intent to outrage modesty

BNS_75.title: Sexual harassment
BNS_75.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both

BNS_76.title: Assault with intent to disrobe woman

BNS_77.title: Voyeurism
BNS_77.punishment: Imprisonment 1 to 3 years, and fine (first offence)

BNS_78.title: Stalking
BNS_78.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, and fine (first offence)

BNS_79.title: Word, gesture or act intended to insult modesty of woman
BNS_79.punishment: Simple imprisonment up to 3 years, and fine

BNS_85.title: Cruelty by husband or his relatives
BNS_85.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, and fine

BNS_86.title: Dowry death
BNS_86.punishment: Imprisonment not less than 7 years, extendable to life

BNS_61.title: Criminal conspiracy
BNS_61.punishment: Same as if he abetted the offence

BNS_191.title: Rioting
BNS_191.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both

BNS_196.title: Promoting enmity between groups
BNS_196.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both

BNS_218.title: Giving false evidence
BNS_218.punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years, and fine

BNS_240.title: Counterfeiting coin
BNS_240.punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years, and fine

BNS_281.title: Rash driving on public way
BNS_281.punishment: Imprisonment up to 6 months, or fine up to 1000, or both

BNS_296.title: Obscene acts and songs
BNS_296.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 months, or fine, or both

BNS_303.title: Theft
BNS_303.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both

BNS_304.title: Snatching
BNS_304.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, and fine

BNS_305.title: Theft in dwelling house
BNS_305.punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years, and fine

BNS_307.title: Robbery
BNS_307.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment up to 10 years, and fine

BNS_308.title: Attempt to commit robbery
BNS_308.punishment: Rigorous imprisonment up to 7 years, and fine

BNS_309.title: Dacoity
BNS_309.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or rigorous imprisonment up to 10 years, and fine

BNS_310.title: Dacoity with murder
BNS_310.punishment: Death or imprisonment for life, and fine

BNS_312.title: Criminal breach of trust
BNS_312.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both

BNS_314.title: Dishonest misappropriation of property
BNS_314.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both

BNS_316.title: Criminal breach of trust by carrier, banker, etc.
BNS_316.punishment: Imprisonment for life, or up to 10 years, and fine

BNS_318.title: Cheating
BNS_318.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years, or fine, or both; up to 7 years if delivery of property involved

BNS_319.title: Cheating by personation
BNS_319.punishment: Imprisonment up to 5 years, or fine, or both

BNS_329.title: Criminal trespass
BNS_329.punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 months, or fine up to 5000, or both

BNS_331.title: House-trespass
BNS_331.punishment: Imprisonment up to 1 year, or fine up to 1000, or both

BNS_333.title: House-breaking
BNS_333.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, and fine

BNS_336.title: Forgery
BNS_336.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both

BNS_338.title: Forgery for purpose of cheating
BNS_338.punishment: Imprisonment up to 7 years, and fine

BNS_340.title: Using forged document as genuine
BNS_340.punishment: Same as for forgery of that document

BNS_351.title: Criminal intimidation
BNS_351.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both

BNS_352.title: Intentional insult to provoke breach of peace
BNS_352.punishment: Imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both

BNS_356.title: Defamation
BNS_356.punishment: Simple imprisonment up to 2 years, or fine, or both
